channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Man pleads guilty to displaying a Nazi symbol at pro-Palestinian rally
item.description: SYDNEY (AP) — A restaurateur pleaded guilty Thursday to displaying a Nazi symbol during a pro-Palestinian rally in Sydney in early October. Alan Yazbek was photographed at the Oct.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Abortion bans are top of mind for young women in North Carolina as they consider Harris or Trump
item.description: WINSTON-SALEM, N.C. (AP) — The TikTok videos haunt 26-year-old Christy Kishbaugh. One seared into her memory shows a young mom talking about how several Idaho emergency rooms rejected her because of the state's abortion ban, leaving her to bleed for weeks after a miscarriage.
item.dc:creator: AMANDA SEITZ and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: California prestigious private school sued after expelling boy, 10, for using squirt gun emoji, rap lyrics
item.description: The parents of 10-year-old student at a Los Angeles private school are suing the school after the boy was expelled for sending emails containing squirt gun emojis and rap lyrics to another student.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pilot Chuck Coleman killed in air show crash in Las Cruces
item.description: Coleman was an aerobatic flight instructor for actors in the 2022 motion picture, "Top Gun: Maverick," where he flew more than 100 flights preparing actors to fly in Navy F-18 Hornets.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, KTLA 5

item.title: Ron Ely, TV's 'Tarzan' in the 1960s, dies at 86
item.description: Ron Ely, the tall, musclebound actor who played the title character in the 1960s NBC series “Tarzan,” has died at age 86.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Suspect in shootings of Democratic office in Arizona had over 200 guns in his home, officials find
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — An Arizona prosecutor said the man arrested in the shooting of a Democratic National Committee office in suburban Phoenix had more than 200 guns and over 250,000 rounds of ammunition in his home, leading law enforcement to believe he may have been planning a mass casualty event.
item.dc:creator: ANITA SNOW and WALTER BERRY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Goldfish changes name of iconic crackers to appeal to adults
item.description: Snack lovers can look forward to a playful twist on a childhood favorite, as Goldfish announces a limited-time renaming of its iconic Cheddar crackers.
item.dc:creator: Talia Naquin, ABC 4

item.title: DNA links suspected serial killer to 19-year-old's cold case murder in Illinois
item.description: Authorities have linked a suspected serial killer to the kidnapping and murder of a 19-year-old Illinois woman, more than 45 years after her death.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lara Trump: Glad Donald Trump is endorsing early, mail-in voting
item.description: She says her father-in-law "understands how important this is to making sure that he wins on election night.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Florida mailman stabs lawncare worker over parking: deputies
item.description: The Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office has released more information about the events that may have led up to a deadly stabbing Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about E. coli and the McDonald's outbreak
item.description: A food poisoning outbreak tied to McDonald’s Quarter Pounders was caused by a common type of E. coli bacteria that can cause serious illness and death. Particularly vulnerable are young children, older people or those with weakened immune systems.
item.dc:creator: JONEL ALECCIA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man wrongly convicted of murder starts new job after 28 years behind bars
item.description: “I knew they have a good reputation of training individuals getting ready for the workforce,” Jones said. He had two sons who completed the program.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: Pennsylvania high court gives voters provisional option if their mail ballots get rejected
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — Pennsylvania's highest court on Wednesday said people whose mail ballots are rejected for not following technical procedures in state law can cast provisional ballots, a decision sure to affect some of the thousands of mail-in votes likely to be rejected this fall.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A man who threatened to kill Democratic election officials pleads guilty
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A Colorado man repeatedly made online threats about killing the top elections officials in his state and Arizona — both Democrats — as well as a judge and law enforcement agents, according to a guilty plea he entered Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani’s 50/50 ball shatters record for most expensive in sports history
item.description: Ohtani became the first player in the sport’s history to hit 50 home runs and steal 50 bases in a season, doing so on Sept. 19 against the Miami Marlins.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: U.S. Dept. of Transportation levies $50 million fine against American Airlines
item.description: The US Department of Transportation has fined American Airlines $50 million for violating the rights of people with disabilities, including unsafe physical assistance resulting in injuries and undignified treatment of wheelchair users.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bad state data may misdirect nearly $1 billion in federal funds to replace lead pipes
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — The Environmental Protection Agency is at risk of misallocating nearly $1 billion in lead pipe replacement funding to the wrong states because it didn’t verify inaccurate data provided by Texas and Florida, an agency watchdog announced.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL PHILLIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carville lists 3 reasons why he thinks Harris will win
item.description: “The biggest reason Mr. Trump will lose is that the whole Republican Party has been on a losing streak since Mr. Trump took it over,” he said in an essay published Wednesday by The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers phenom Fernando Valenzuela dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump hurls string of insults at Harris including racist trope against Black people
item.description: Trump signaled he will lean harder into disparaging Harris during the remaining two weeks before Election Day, despite the urging of allies who have repeatedly suggested he should steer clear of personal attacks including references to her race and gender.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Missouri woman finds trunk full of stolen campaign signs with help of Apple AirTag
item.description: "I expected to find the AirTag, but not 59 signs. It was kind of like finding a dead body," the Missouri woman said.
item.dc:creator: Parker Padgett, KRON4

item.title: Judge tosses RNC challenge to Michigan voter roll maintenance
item.description: U.S. District Judge Jane Beckering ruled that neither the RNC nor two individual voters who joined the suit had legal standing to bring their case.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KRON4

item.title: North Carolina county surrounding Asheville overcounted Helene deaths by as many as 30, sheriff says
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The North Carolina county that is home to Asheville overcounted deaths caused by Helene by as many as 30, according to a statement Tuesday from its sheriff’s office and data from the state, significantly reducing the death toll from the historic storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Richard N. Winfield, First Amendment lawyer and former AP counsel, dies at 91
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Richard N. Winfield, a leading U.S. First Amendment lawyer who represented The Associated Press for three decades and championed freedom of expression for journalists around the world, died on Tuesday. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 19-year-old woman found dead in oven in Canada Walmart
item.description: A Canadian Walmart store was closed for a third day Tuesday as police investigated the death of a woman whose body was found inside an oven.
item.dc:creator: Wil Day, Fox 5

item.title: Insurance company refuses to pay 82-year-old Las Vegas woman's claim after her home burned down
item.description: Two weeks before the fire, the insurance company canceled the woman's policy, accusing her of running a motorcycle repair shop out of her home — something the 82-year-old woman denies.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Oscar forms in the Caribbean
item.description: The formation of Oscar and Nadine comes as parts of the U.S. have been hit hard by a pair of hurricanes, Helene and Milton, that devastated communities, destroyed roads, caused power outages, took lives and injured many.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: On Lake Erie, getting rid of problem algae starts with giving it less food
item.description: OREGON, Ohio (AP) — On a warm late-summer evening, a small speedboat motored across a pea-green stretch of Lake Erie past a beach where a child sat splashing and a pair of newlyweds waded for a portrait photographer.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA A. BICKEL and PATRICK AFTOORA-ORSAGOS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Eyewitness video captures frantic efforts to save lives after deadly collapse of dock walkway
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — The metal gangway where dozens of people waited to board a ferry boat made a loud, creaking noise before snapping in the middle amid panicked cries from those sent plunging into the water.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: White House public tour gets makeover with 'reimagined' visitor experience
item.description: The White House public tour is getting an extreme makeover, with new digital exhibits, an expanded route and more access to rooms poised to be part of the "reimagined" experience for visitors.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: McDonald's says it doesn't endorse political candidates after Trump visit
item.description: McDonald's is emphasizing its political neutrality after former President Donald Trump spent some time behind the counter at one of its Pennsylvania locations.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, Fox 5

item.title: Navy identifies 2 killed in fighter jet crash as aviators from California
item.description: The Navy identified on Monday the two crew members who died last week in a jet fighter crash near Mount Rainier as two 31-year-old aviators from California. Lt. Cmdr. Lyndsay P. Evans, a Naval Flight Officer, and Lt. Serena N.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Still using 'LOL'? That could mean you are getting old
item.description: As time has seen several follow-up iterations, including ROFL and LMAO, the original "laugh out loud" acronym is a telltale sign that who you are talking to may be a millennial.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Battleground Florida: FEMA funds
item.description: Tampa Bay is working to recover from two recent back-to-back hurricanes that impacted the state weeks away from the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Top 5 ways education would look different under Harris vs. Trump
item.description: Education issues have flown under the radar this election cycle despite both major candidates having big ideas about how the K-12 and college systems should work.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WGN 9

item.title: WATCH: Liam Payne fans pay tribute after singer's tragic death
item.description: Days after former One Direction singer, Liam Payne, died at age 31 while in Argentina, fans all over the world are paying tribute at his vigil in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Missing teen kayaker found clinging to kayak off Waikiki
item.description: "I think he was in total shock because he wasn't emotional at all. I was actually crying my guts off because he was okay.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Napuunoa, WGN 9
